req.title: Overdraft protection (boundary variant)
req.statement: An overdraft shall trigger a draw from the linked savings account up to the linked account's available balance; otherwise the transaction shall be declined. Boundary behaviour at exact min/max thresholds must be tested.
preconditions: overdraft linked

doc.reasoning: R-FIN-037 defines overdraft protection with three key partitions: (1) debit exceeds checking but savings covers it (positive/EP), (2) debit exceeds both accounts (negative/NEG), and (3) debit equals exactly the savings balance — the boundary draw (BVA). A fourth test covers the state transition from 'overdraft triggered' to 'fee assessed' (STC). A fifth test uses a decision table to validate the combined condition of insufficient checking AND insufficient savings (DT). BVA is applied at the exact-maximum threshold of the linked savings balance. All tests use fixture-injected accounts to remain idempotent.

tests.name: test_overdraft_draws_from_savings_when_checking_insufficient
preconditions: Customer has a checking account with balance $50.00
Customer has a linked savings account with balance $200.00
Overdraft protection is enabled and linked
actions: POST /overdraft with debit amount $120.00 against the checking account
expected: Overdraft fee assessed on the checking account
tests.executable:
def test_overdraft_draws_from_savings_when_checking_insufficient(api_client, overdraft_account_fixture):
    accounts = overdraft_account_fixture(checking_balance=50.00, savings_balance=200.00)
    payload = {
        "account_id": accounts["checking_id"],
        "amount": 120.00
    }
    resp = api_client.post("/overdraft", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["status"] == "approved"
    savings = api_client.get(f"/accounts/{accounts['savings_id']}").json()
    assert savings["balance"] == pytest.approx(130.00)
    checking = api_client.get(f"/accounts/{accounts['checking_id']}").json()
    assert any(t["type"] == "overdraft_fee" for t in checking["transactions"])

tests.name: test_overdraft_declined_when_savings_also_insufficient
preconditions: Customer has a checking account with balance $10.00
Customer has a linked savings account with balance $30.00
Overdraft protection is enabled and linked
actions: POST /overdraft with debit amount $100.00 against the checking account
trace: R-FIN-037: declined when linked balance insufficient
tests.executable:
def test_overdraft_declined_when_savings_also_insufficient(api_client, overdraft_account_fixture):
    accounts = overdraft_account_fixture(checking_balance=10.00, savings_balance=30.00)
    payload = {
        "account_id": accounts["checking_id"],
        "amount": 100.00
    }
    resp = api_client.post("/overdraft", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code in (402, 422)
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["status"] == "declined"
    savings = api_client.get(f"/accounts/{accounts['savings_id']}").json()
    assert savings["balance"] == pytest.approx(30.00)
    checking = api_client.get(f"/accounts/{accounts['checking_id']}").json()
    assert not any(t["type"] == "overdraft_fee" for t in checking["transactions"])

tests.name: test_overdraft_at_exact_savings_maximum_boundary
preconditions: Customer has a checking account with balance $0.00
Customer has a linked savings account with balance $50.00
Overdraft protection is enabled and linked
Debit amount equals exactly the savings balance ($50.00)
actions: POST /overdraft with debit amount $50.00 against the checking account
expected: Savings account balance is exactly $0.00 after draw
trace: R-FIN-037: boundary behaviour at exact max threshold
R-FIN-037: linked savings debited up to available balance
tests.executable:
def test_overdraft_at_exact_savings_maximum_boundary(api_client, overdraft_account_fixture):
    accounts = overdraft_account_fixture(checking_balance=0.00, savings_balance=50.00)
    payload = {
        "account_id": accounts["checking_id"],
        "amount": 50.00
    }
    resp = api_client.post("/overdraft", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["status"] == "approved"
    savings = api_client.get(f"/accounts/{accounts['savings_id']}").json()
    assert savings["balance"] == pytest.approx(0.00)
    checking = api_client.get(f"/accounts/{accounts['checking_id']}").json()
    assert any(t["type"] == "overdraft_fee" for t in checking["transactions"])

tests.name: test_overdraft_boundary_one_cent_over_savings_maximum_declined
preconditions: Customer has a checking account with balance $0.00
Customer has a linked savings account with balance $50.00
Overdraft protection is enabled and linked
Debit amount is $50.01, one cent above the savings balance
actions: POST /overdraft with debit amount $50.01 against the checking account
trace: R-FIN-037: boundary behaviour at exact min threshold — one cent over maximum
R-FIN-037: declined when linked balance insufficient
tests.executable:
def test_overdraft_boundary_one_cent_over_savings_maximum_declined(api_client, overdraft_account_fixture):
    accounts = overdraft_account_fixture(checking_balance=0.00, savings_balance=50.00)
    payload = {
        "account_id": accounts["checking_id"],
        "amount": 50.01
    }
    resp = api_client.post("/overdraft", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code in (402, 422)
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["status"] == "declined"
    savings = api_client.get(f"/accounts/{accounts['savings_id']}").json()
    assert savings["balance"] == pytest.approx(50.00)
    checking = api_client.get(f"/accounts/{accounts['checking_id']}").json()
    assert not any(t["type"] == "overdraft_fee" for t in checking["transactions"])

tests.name: test_overdraft_state_transitions_from_triggered_to_fee_assessed
preconditions: Customer has checking balance $20.00 and savings balance $100.00
Overdraft protection is linked
Account state is NORMAL (no prior overdraft this session)
actions: POST /overdraft with debit $80.00 to trigger overdraft state
GET /accounts/{checking_id} to verify state is OVERDRAFT_ACTIVE
GET /accounts/{checking_id}/transactions to verify fee transaction exists
expected: After debit: account state transitions to OVERDRAFT_ACTIVE
A fee transaction of type overdraft_fee appears in transaction history
trace: R-FIN-037: fee assessed as part of state change
tests.executable:
def test_overdraft_state_transitions_from_triggered_to_fee_assessed(api_client, overdraft_account_fixture):
    accounts = overdraft_account_fixture(checking_balance=20.00, savings_balance=100.00)
    payload = {"account_id": accounts["checking_id"], "amount": 80.00}
    resp = api_client.post("/overdraft", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    assert resp.json()["status"] == "approved"
    checking = api_client.get(f"/accounts/{accounts['checking_id']}").json()
    assert checking["overdraft_state"] == "OVERDRAFT_ACTIVE"
    savings = api_client.get(f"/accounts/{accounts['savings_id']}").json()
    assert savings["balance"] == pytest.approx(40.00)
    txns = api_client.get(f"/accounts/{accounts['checking_id']}/transactions").json()
    fee_txns = [t for t in txns if t["type"] == "overdraft_fee"]
    assert len(fee_txns) == 1

tests.name: test_overdraft_decision_table_no_linked_account
preconditions: Customer has a checking account with balance $10.00
No savings account is linked to the checking account
Overdraft protection is NOT configured
actions: POST /overdraft with debit amount $50.00 against the checking account
expected: Error code indicates no linked overdraft account
trace: R-FIN-037: error pathway — no linked savings account configured
R-FIN-037: declined when linked balance insufficient (no linked account = zero available)
tests.executable:
def test_overdraft_decision_table_no_linked_account(api_client, unlinked_account_fixture):
    account = unlinked_account_fixture(checking_balance=10.00)
    payload = {
        "account_id": account["checking_id"],
        "amount": 50.00
    }
    resp = api_client.post("/overdraft", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code in (400, 422)
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["status"] == "declined"
    assert "no_linked_account" in body.get("error_code", "")
    checking = api_client.get(f"/accounts/{account['checking_id']}").json()
    assert checking["balance"] == pytest.approx(10.00)
